title: Evangelion takes place this year
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion takes place this year Post by Dima » Tue Jan 06, 2015 3:18 am In the Year 2015. I first watched the series in 2008 or 2009. Even then the 2015 seemed way far. How many has happened to you, to see a future date in a movie/series, you know the ones that are years away and we are telling to ourselves ''wow that date, in what state the humanity will be at that point, will i be alive?'' The year is 2015. Crazy stuff.

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Tue Jan 06, 2015 3:31 am I think they are having this kind of discussion here [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/17070/So-were-about-to-live-the-days-of-the-Angel-attacks/[/url]
